\[(x - \sqrt[3]{20})(x - \sqrt[3]{60})(x - \sqrt[3]{120}) = 1.\]
Find the value of $r^3 + s^3 + t^3$ where $r,$ $s,$ and $t$ are the distinct solutions to this equation.', initial_info={'experiment_name': 'orz57k-notool', 'task_model_id': 'bedrock/google.gemma-3-4b-it', 'episode_index': 0}, steps=[TrajectoryStep(step_index=1, action="Let $r, s, t$ be the roots of the equation $(x - \sqrt[3]{20})(x - \sqrt[3]{60})(x - \sqrt[3]{120}) = 1$.
Expanding the left side, we have
\begin{align*} (x - \sqrt[3]{20})(x - \sqrt[3]{60})(x - \sqrt[3]{120}) &= (x - \sqrt[3]{20})(x^2 - (\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120})x + \sqrt[3]{60}\sqrt[3]{120}) \\ &= (x - \sqrt[3]{20})(x^2 - (\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120})x + \sqrt[3]{7200}) \\ &= x^3 - (\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120})x^2 + \sqrt[3]{7200}x - \sqrt[3]{20}x^2 + \sqrt[3]{20}(\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120})x - \sqrt[3]{20}\sqrt[3]{7200} \\ &= x^3 - (\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120} + \sqrt[3]{20})x^2 + (\sqrt[3]{7200} + \sqrt[3]{20}(\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120}))x - \sqrt[3]{144000} \end{align*}
Thus, we have
\[ x^3 - (\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120} + \sqrt[3]{20})x^2 + (\sqrt[3]{7200} + \sqrt[3]{20}(\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120}))x - \sqrt[3]{144000} = 1 \]
\[ x^3 - (\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120} + \sqrt[3]{20})x^2 + (\sqrt[3]{7200} + \sqrt[3]{20}(\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120}))x - \sqrt[3]{144000} - 1 = 0 \]
Let $r, s, t$ be the roots of this equation. Then by Vieta's formulas, we have
\begin{align*} r+s+t &= \sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120} + \sqrt[3]{20} \\ rs+rt+st &= \sqrt[3]{7200} + \sqrt[3]{20}(\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120}) \\ rst &= \sqrt[3]{144000} + 1 \end{align*}
We want to find $r^3 + s^3 + t^3$. We have the identity
\[ r^3 + s^3 + t^3 - 3rst = (r+s+t)(r^2+s^2+t^2 - rs - rt - st) \]
Also, we know that $r^2+s^2+t^2 = (r+s+t)^2 - 2(rs+rt+st)$.
So,
\[ r^3 + s^3 + t^3 - 3rst = (r+s+t)((r+s+t)^2 - 2(rs+rt+st) - (rs+rt+st)) \]
\[ r^3 + s^3 + t^3 - 3rst = (r+s+t)((r+s+t)^2 - 3(rs+rt+st)) \]
Therefore,
\[ r^3 + s^3 + t^3 = (r+s+t)((r+s+t)^2 - 3(rs+rt+st)) + 3rst \]
Substituting the values from Vieta's formulas, we have
\begin{align*} r^3 + s^3 + t^3 &= (\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120} + \sqrt[3]{20})((\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120} + \sqrt[3]{20})^2 - 3(\sqrt[3]{7200} + \sqrt[3]{20}(\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120}))) + 3(\sqrt[3]{144000} + 1) \\ &= (\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120} + \sqrt[3]{20})((\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120} + \sqrt[3]{20})^2 - 3(\sqrt[3]{7200} + \sqrt[3]{20}(\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120}))) + 3(\sqrt[3]{144000} + 1) \end{align*}
However, we can also use the fact that $x^3 - (\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120} + \sqrt[3]{20})x^2 + (\sqrt[3]{7200} + \sqrt[3]{20}(\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120}))x - \sqrt[3]{144000} - 1 = 0$.
Since $r, s, t$ are the roots, we have $r^3 - (\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120} + \sqrt[3]{20})r^2 + (\sqrt[3]{7200} + \sqrt[3]{20}(\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120}))r - \sqrt[3]{144000} - 1 = 0$.
Then $r^3 = (\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120} + \sqrt[3]{20})r^2 - (\sqrt[3]{7200} + \sqrt[3]{20}(\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120}))r + \sqrt[3]{144000} + 1$.
Similarly, $s^3 = (\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120} + \sqrt[3]{20})s^2 - (\sqrt[3]{7200} + \sqrt[3]{20}(\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120}))s + \sqrt[3]{144000} + 1$ and $t^3 = (\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120} + \sqrt[3]{20})t^2 - (\sqrt[3]{7200} + \sqrt[3]{20}(\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120}))t + \sqrt[3]{144000} + 1$.
Adding these three equations, we get
\[ r^3 + s^3 + t^3 = (\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120} + \sqrt[3]{20})(r^2+s^2+t^2) - (\sqrt[3]{7200} + \sqrt[3]{20}(\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120}))(r+s+t) + 3(\sqrt[3]{144000} + 1) \]
We have $r^2+s^2+t^2 = (r+s+t)^2 - 2(rs+rt+st) = (\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120} + \sqrt[3]{20})^2 - 2(\sqrt[3]{7200} + \sqrt[3]{20}(\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120}))$.
So,
\[ r^3 + s^3 + t^3 = (\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120} + \sqrt[3]{20})((\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120} + \sqrt[3]{20})^2 - 2(\sqrt[3]{7200} + \sqrt[3]{20}(\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120}))) - (\sqrt[3]{7200} + \sqrt[3]{20}(\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120}))(\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120} + \sqrt[3]{20}) + 3(\sqrt[3]{144000} + 1) \]
Let $a = \sqrt[3]{20}$, $b = \sqrt[3]{60}$, $c = \sqrt[3]{120}$. Then $(x-a)(x-b)(x-c) = x^3 - (a+b+c)x^2 + (ab+bc+ca)x - abc = 1$.
Thus $a+b+c = \sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120} + \sqrt[3]{20}$, $ab+bc+ca = \sqrt[3]{7200} + \sqrt[3]{20}(\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120})$, and $abc = \sqrt[3]{144000} + 1$.
We want to find $r^3+s^3+t^3$. We know that $r+s+t = a+b+c$, $rs+rt+st = ab+bc+ca$, and $rst = abc$.
Then $r^3+s^3+t^3 = (r+s+t)^3 - 3(r+s+t)(rs+rt+st) + 3rst = (a+b+c)^3 - 3(a+b+c)(ab+bc+ca) + 3(abc)$.
\[ (a+b+c)^3 = a^3+b^3+c^3 + 3(a^2b+a^2c+b^2a+b^2c+c^2a+c^2b) + 6abc \]
\[ (a+b+c)^3 = a^3+b^3+c^3 + 3(a+b+c)(ab+bc+ca) - 3abc \]
We have $r^3+s^3+t^3 = (a+b+c)^3 - 3(a+b+c)(ab+bc+ca) + 3abc = (a+b+c)^3 - 3(a+b+c)(ab+bc+ca) + 3(abc)$.
Since $(x-a)(x-b)(x-c) = x^3 - (a+b+c)x^2 + (ab+bc+ca)x - abc = 1$, we have $x^3 - (a+b+c)x^2 + (ab+bc+ca)x - (abc+1) = 0$.
Thus $r^3 - (a+b+c)r^2 + (ab+bc+ca)r - (abc+1) = 0$, $s^3 - (a+b+c)s^2 + (ab+bc+ca)s - (abc+1) = 0$, $t^3 - (a+b+c)t^2 + (ab+bc+ca)t - (abc+1) = 0$.
Adding these three equations, we get $r^3+s^3+t^3 - (a+b+c)(r^2+s^2+t^2) + (ab+bc+ca)(r+s+t) - 3(abc+1) = 0$.
$r^3+s^3+t^3 = (a+b+c)(r^2+s^2+t^2) - (ab+bc+ca)(r+s+t) + 3(abc+1)$.

Since $r, s, t$ are roots of the equation $(x - \sqrt[3]{20})(x - \sqrt[3]{60})(x - \sqrt[3]{120}) = 1$, we have $r^3 - (\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120} + \sqrt[3]{20})r^2 + (\sqrt[3]{7200} + \sqrt[3]{20}(\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120}))r - \sqrt[3]{144000} - 1 = 0$.
Then $r^3 = (\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120} + \sqrt[3]{20})r^2 - (\sqrt[3]{7200} + \sqrt[3]{20}(\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120}))r + \sqrt[3]{144000} + 1$.
Similarly, $s^3 = (\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120} + \sqrt[3]{20})s^2 - (\sqrt[3]{7200} + \sqrt[3]{20}(\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120}))s + \sqrt[3]{144000} + 1$ and $t^3 = (\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120} + \sqrt[3]{20})t^2 - (\sqrt[3]{7200} + \sqrt[3]{20}(\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120}))t + \sqrt[3]{144000} + 1$.
Adding these three equations, we get $r^3+s^3+t^3 = (\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120} + \sqrt[3]{20})(r^2+s^2+t^2) - (\sqrt[3]{7200} + \sqrt[3]{20}(\sqrt[3]{60} + \sqrt[3]{120}))(r+s+t) + 3(\sqrt[3]{144000} + 1)$.
